THOUGHT: The crash occurs due to an assertion in ScalarEvolution::isLoopEntryGuardedByCond that assumes the RHS SCEV is available at loop entry. In this reproducer, loop predication queries SCEV with conditions that are not guaranteed to be available at entry, causing the assert to fire. ```
